title: The Definitive Reading List
html:
A long-form reading list, reorganized for note-viewing rather than Jekyll. The original upload already had strong top-level buckets - physics, mathematics, computer science, electronics, essays, and miscellany - so this note keeps that structure, fixes a few broken links / malformed headings, and makes it browseable inside the site.

A good way to extend it is to split especially large sections into standalone notes later, then keep this page as the umbrella index.

This is just what I managed to remember to put here. Any suggestions welcome (altough my reading list won't allow me for much).
